title: Mobile Frontend Baseline
goal: Create a Flutter app scaffold with clean architecture (BLoC), responsive UI/UX design, and core screens for ASL translation features, ensuring a chic, friendly interface with resting colors, animations, and transitions.
scope: Generate a Flutter project in mobile/ with clean architecture folders (lib/app, lib/features, lib/core, lib/shared).
Implement BLoC pattern for state management across features.
Design and implement key screens: Home (welcome/onboarding), Camera Capture (for ASL signs), Translation Results (subtitles/audio display), Settings (user preferences, accessibility).
Apply responsive layout using Flutter's responsive widgets, ensuring support for various screen sizes.

Incorporate UI/UX guidelines: resting color palette (e.g., soft blues/greens), smooth animations/transitions (e.g., fade-ins for results, gesture-based interactions), accessibility features for deaf users (e.g., high contrast, large text).
Add placeholder content and basic navigation between screens.
Ensure the app builds and runs on at least one supported platform (Android/iOS), with no build errors.
deliverables: mobile/pubspec.yaml with dependencies for BLoC, camera, animations, and UI libraries.
lib/main.dart entrypoint with app initialization, theme setup (resting colors), and routing.
Core architecture folders with BLoC implementations for each feature.
Screens with responsive layouts, animations (e.g., using Flutter's Hero, AnimatedContainer), and placeholder ASL-related content.
Basic camera permission handling and mock camera feed for sign capture.
Audit report and bug log for this phase.

bloc_example.state: class HomeLoadedState extends HomeState { final String message; HomeLoadedState(this.message); }
bloc_example.bloc: if (event is LoadHomeEvent) { yield HomeLoadedState('Welcome to ASL App'); }

examples.screen_structure: Scaffold(appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Home')), body: Center(child: Text('ASL Translation Ready')));

must_verify: Flutter project builds successfully without errors.
App launches, navigates between screens smoothly with animations/transitions.
UI is responsive and follows chic design principles (resting colors, friendly layout).
BLoC state management is implemented correctly with no crashes.
Project structure aligns with clean architecture and spec expectations.
No unsatisfied dependencies; all packages are compatible and licensed appropriately.
corrections.json is created with fixes for any identified issues.
